compiled_state.title: E2E: Integration test for archived exclusion workflow
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Create an integration test that exercises the full archived exclusion workflow end-to-end:
1. Create a tracker with multiple tickets including dependencies
2. Archive one ticket
3. Verify ticket list excludes it by default
4. Verify ticket list --include-archived restores it
5. Verify ticket deps traversal still works through archived mid-chain tickets
6. Verify ticket deps on an archived ticket directly shows clear error
7. Verify ticket deps --include-archived on an archived ticket works

**Why**: Unit tests cover individual functions/CLI flags in isolation, but cross-command consistency of the archived exclusion feature needs E2E coverage.

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived-exclusion-e2e.sh (create)
- .test-index (add mapping if needed — fuzzy match should catch it via 'ticket' substring)

### TDD Requirement
Unit test exemption: integration test — scaffolding task creating a new integration test file. Criteria: integration exemption criterion 2 (scaffolding task with no behavioral contract to assert RED-first — the test itself IS the deliverable).

### Test approach
Bash integration test using existing test helpers (assert_eq etc). Creates a temporary git repo with ticket system, populates it, archives a ticket, then runs the various commands and verifies outputs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Integration test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived-exclusion-e2e.sh
- [ ] Test covers list exclusion
  Verify: grep -q 'include-archived' tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived-exclusion-e2e.sh
- [ ] Test covers deps traversal through archived
  Verify: grep -q 'deps.*archived\|archived.*deps' tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived-exclusion-e2e.sh
- [ ] Test covers error message for direct archived target
  Verify: grep -q 'archived.*error\|Error.*archived' tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived-exclusion-e2e.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (test is the deliverable) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Test run passed — 15 assertions across 6 tests, all PASS ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All AC verified: file exists, include-archived covered, deps covered, archived error message covered. ruff check passes. 15 assertions PASS.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: E2E integration test for archived exclusion workflow — 6 scenarios, 15 assertions
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
